results.title: Meghan Markle given sweet note as she makes first UK visit in years
results.description: Meghan Markle made her first UK visit in years during a brief Heathrow stopover while flying home to Los Angeles from Geneva.

results.title: Furious Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding guest irked by alleged invitation request: So awkward
results.description: Furious Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding guest irked by alleged invitation request: ‘So awkward’ https://t.co/y6moywACUt pic.twitter.com/1jE1Z4Bk3L — Page Six (@PageSix) May 23, 2026 The Daily Fail is bored. They revealed an alleged wedding guest got their invite to Taylor Swift’s wedding and weren’t allowed a plus one. “My invite did not let me bring a plus-one,” an unnamed guest claimed to the Daily Fail . “I mean, what am I supposed to do? Go alone? That is so awkward. I don’t think I am going to attend because I don’t want to go by myself and I am not sure I will know too many people there. I mean, sorry, I am not friends with Gigi and Bella Hadid!” So real, believable and relatable. Source
results.source: Livejournal: Discover Global Communities Of Blogge

results.title: All of Us Strangers buys into tropes of tragic queer lives
results.description: On the surface, All of Us Strangers is a dark and twisty love story. Underneath, there is the often-present storyline seen in queer cinema: that of trauma and...
